{{Quote|Imagine a man like that abusing his position and authority.|[[Deerian]]|<ref name="Allegiance (novel)">[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]</ref>}}
'''Glovstoak''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who was discovered to be embezzling funds by [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. After this revelation, he was removed from office and charged with embezzlement and [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. [[Mink Bollis]] was an aide of his. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Deerian]] was another member of his staff.

{{Char-stub}}
